name: River Resolve
description: Stream finding its calm pool after flowing rapids

prompts.label: mountain stream settling into a calm pool
prompts.text: mountain stream settling into a calm pool, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay

prompts.label: water flowing over smooth stones to peaceful rest
prompts.text: water flowing over smooth stones to peaceful rest, moss-covered stone garden, rain droplet on broad leaf, sun-warmed earth, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: river current slowing to gentle lapping at the shore
prompts.text: river current slowing to gentle lapping at the shore, bamboo grove in gentle wind, smooth river stones clinking, birdsong tranquility, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, sustained resonance

prompts.label: waterfall mist settling into still pond surface
prompts.text: waterfall mist settling into still pond surface, creek bed after summer rain, fingertip-plucked kalimba tine, deep forest solitude, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, with natural decay

prompts.label: brook babble resolving into tranquil silence
prompts.text: brook babble resolving into tranquil silence, meadow with distant thunder, ceramic wind chime in breeze, waterfall mist on skin, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, smooth fade out
